text:
Created attachment 150653
Patch from 3.1.0 to 3.1.1

The software version is updated to 3.1.1.
 This version includes an improvement in automatic conflict resolution and bug fixes on broken -q option emerged in version 3.1.0 and on a problem caused by a specification change of pkg.
